text:
Once upon a time in the lush woods beyond the village lived a clever bunny. His whiskers twitched with interest whenever he spotted something unusual amongst the tall oaks.

One sunny afternoon, our dear bunny discovered a peculiar stone surrounded by odd shapes. They looked like smiley faces.

Curiously, he pushed one aside. There was space inside. He tucked away treasures there—small shiny objects his siblings would love.

Each day after that, he hid treasures. But his little brother had eyes like hawk feathers. You could say our brooding owl knew a thing or two about surprises.

One chilly night under the full moon, the owl swooped down. With a sneaky paw, he grabbed a precious pearl. Our clever bunny noticed an owl feathers caught on the edge.

With an eagle eye, he zeroed in. Sure enough, just one feather flew away.

Our bunny sighed a little. That pearl's glow was fading.
